SUMMARY
Final-year computer science student focused on machine learning systems, applied NLP, and developer tooling.

EDUCATION
B.Tech in Computer Science, IIT Jodhpur, GPA 8.7/10

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Python, SQL, PyTorch, scikit-learn, FastAPI, Docker, GCP, Git, Streamlit

PROJECTS
Campus Mentor Bot
- Built a retrieval augmented chatbot for campus FAQs using Python, FastAPI, and vector search.
- Reduced repeated admin queries by 35% during student onboarding week.

Interview Debrief Summarizer
- Created an NLP pipeline that summarizes interviewer notes and clusters candidate concerns.
- Evaluated prompts across 120 transcripts and improved summary acceptance to 81%.

EXPERIENCE
Machine Learning Intern, Quill Labs
- Fine-tuned a text classification model for support routing and deployed the inference API with FastAPI.
- Worked with product and analytics teams to review model quality each sprint.
